basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) Officer-in-Charge Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of ECHS. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ECHS Officer-in-Charge Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Officer-in-Charge (ECHS PC Cooch Behar): Defence Officer drawing pension, Graduate. (100% Reserved for Ex-Servicemen Officers)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Officer-in-Charge Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download ECHS Officer-in-Charge Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ECHS Officer-in-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the ECHS Officer-in-Charge position is 10th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Officer-in-Charge post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Officer-in-Charge position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 95,000.

faq.question: Q3. What are the eligibility criteria for the Officer-in-Charge role?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a Defence Officer drawing a pension and hold a Graduate degree. This post is exclusively reserved for Ex-Servicemen Officers.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Officer-in-Charge post is 65 years.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for this government job?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted offline. You need to download the application form from the official website, fill it out, and send it along with required documents via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Officer-in-Charge position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the ECHS official website, www.echs.gov.in. Links are provided in the Important Links section.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for the Officer-in-Charge position is Contractual.

faq.question: Q10. In which city and state is this vacancy located?
faq.answer: This vacancy is located in Cooch Behar, West Bengal.
